text:
In the first space, I feel a mixture of anticipation and slight unease—corridors and modern angles give it a clinical, almost surreal quality. The glowing exit signs hint at escape, yet my curiosity overpowers my anxiety.

Moving to the R+D exhibit, I'm enveloped by a sense of wonder and intellectual stimulation. The display speaks to human-machine relationships, sparking thoughts about coexistence and progress. Here I feel engaged, provoked to contemplate how research shapes the boundaries between humanity and technology. The vibrant colors and thoughtful texts draw me in, encouraging reflection.
